---
title: 'Enneagram Test Type 4: The Individualist'
date: '2020-04-04T06:23:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4915358189534915648'
blogger_filename: '/2020/04/enneagram-test-type-4-individualist.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<div class="WordSection1">  <p class="MsoNormal"><a href="https://enneagramtest.net/">https://enneagramtest.net/</a><o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><b>Type 4: The Individualist<o:p></o:p></b></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="background: yellow;">Individualists have sensitive feelings and are warm and perceptive.</span><o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">How to Get Along with Me<o:p></o:p></p>  <ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc">  <li class="MsoNormal">Give me plenty of compliments. They mean a lot to me.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Be a supportive friend or partner. Help me to learn to love and value myself.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Respect me for my special gifts of intuition and vision.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Though I don't always want to be cheered up when I'm feeling melancholy, I sometimes like to have someone lighten me up a little.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal"><span style="background: yellow;">Don't tell me I'm too sensitive or that I'm overreacting!<o:p></o:p></span></li></ul>  <p class="MsoNormal">What I Like About Being a Four<o:p></o:p></p>  <ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc">  <li class="MsoNormal">My ability to find meaning in life and to experience feeling at a deep level.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">my ability to establish warm connections with people.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Admiring what is noble, truthful, and beautiful in life.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">My creativity, intuition, and sense of humor.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Being unique and being seen as unique by others.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Having aesthetic sensibilities.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Being able to easily pick up the feelings of people around me.<o:p></o:p></li></ul>  <p class="MsoNormal">What's Hard About Being a Four<o:p></o:p></p>  <ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc">  <li class="MsoNormal">Experiencing dark moods of emptiness and despair.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Feelings of self-hatred and shame; believing I don't deserve to be loved.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Feeling guilty when I disappoint people.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Feeling hurt or attacked when someone misundertands me.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Expecting too much from myself and life.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal"><span style="background: yellow;">Fearing being abandoned.<o:p></o:p></span></li><li class="MsoNormal"><span style="background: yellow;">Obsessing over resentments.<o:p></o:p></span></li><li class="MsoNormal">Longing for what I don't have.<o:p></o:p></li></ul>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><b>Type 5: The Investigator<o:p></o:p></b></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">Investigators have a need for knowledge and are introverted, curious, analytical, and insightful.<o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">How to Get Along with Me<o:p></o:p></p>  <ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc">  <li class="MsoNormal">Be independent, not clingy.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Speak in a straightforward and brief manner.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">I need time alone to process my feelings and thoughts.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Remember that If I seem aloof, distant, or arrogant, it may be that I am feeling uncomfortable.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Make me feel welcome, but not too intensely, or I might doubt your sincerity.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">If I become irritated when I have to repeat things, it may be because it was such an effort to get my thoughts out in the first place.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">don't come on like a bulldozer.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Help me to avoid my pet peeves: big parties, other people's loud music, overdone emotions, and intrusions on my privacy.<o:p></o:p></li></ul>  <p class="MsoNormal">What I Like About Being a Five<o:p></o:p></p>  <ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc">  <li class="MsoNormal">Standing back and viewing life objectively.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Coming to a thorough understanding; perceiving causes and effects.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">My sense of integrity: doing what I think is right and not being influenced by social pressure.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Not being caught up in material possessions and status.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Being calm in a crisis.<o:p></o:p></li></ul>  <p class="MsoNormal">What's Hard About Being a Five<o:p></o:p></p>  <ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc">  <li class="MsoNormal">Being slow to put my knowledge and insights out in the world.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Feeling bad when I act defensive or like a know-it-all.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Being pressured to be with people when I don't want to be.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Watching others with better social skills, but less intelligence or technical skill, do better professionally.<o:p></o:p></li></ul>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><b>Type 7: The Enthusiast<o:p></o:p></b></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">Enthusiasts are energetic, lively, and optimistic. They want to contribute to the world.<o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">How to Get Along with Me<o:p></o:p></p>  <ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc">  <li class="MsoNormal">Give me companionship, affection, and freedom.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Engage with me in stimulating conversation and laughter.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Appreciate my grand visions and listen to my stories.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Don't try to change my style. Accept me the way I am.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Be responsible for youself. I dislike clingy or needy people.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Don't tell me what to do.<o:p></o:p></li></ul>  <p class="MsoNormal">What I Like About Being a Seven<o:p></o:p></p>  <ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc">  <li class="MsoNormal">Being optimistic and not letting life's troubles get me down.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Being spontaneous and free-spirited.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Being outspoken and outrageous. It's part of the fun.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Being generous and trying to make the world a better place.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Having the guts to take risks and to try exciting adventures.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Having such varied interests and abilities.<o:p></o:p></li></ul>  <p class="MsoNormal">What's Hard About Being a Seven<o:p></o:p></p>  <ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc">  <li class="MsoNormal">Not having enough time to do all the things I want.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Not completing things I start.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Not being able to profit from the benefits that come from specializing; not making a commitment to a career.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Having a tendency to be ungrounded; getting lost in plans or fantasies.<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal">Feeling confined when I'm in a one-to-one relationship.<o:p></o:p></li></ul>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p></div>
